activate_to_see_data: Activate the Adblocker to see data
data_from: Data from Android TrafficStats · Counted since device boot
create_account_to_use: Create an account to use PureDNS.
already_have_account: Already have an account? Log In
feature_1_desc: Block annoying ads and invisible trackers system-wide in all apps.
feature_2_desc: Load websites faster and save data volume by blocking unnecessary content.
feature_3_desc: Encrypted DNS-over-HTTPS. We keep no logs. Your data belongs to you.
faq_1_a: PureDNS redirects your DNS requests through a local VPN tunnel on your device. Requests to known ad and tracking domains are blocked directly before they can load.
faq_2_q: Why do I need a VPN profile?
faq_2_a: Android only allows changing DNS settings for mobile data via the local VPN interface. No real VPN server is used, your data remains locally on the device.
faq_3_q: Does the app consume a lot of battery?
faq_3_a: No, because filtering happens at the DNS level and the entire traffic is not analyzed, the battery consumption of PureDNS is extremely low.
really_logout: Do you really want to log out?
delete_warning: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account and all associated data? This step cannot be undone.
dns_servers_subtitle: Overview of all available modes and their servers
dns_footer_note: All servers are operated by Quad9 / AdGuard / own providers. DNS-over-HTTPS is used via VPN interface.
mode_normal_desc: With balanced blocklists, you surf the internet fast, ad-free, without tracking, and protected from malware.
mode_clean_desc: With extended youth protection blocklists and activated SafeSearch for search engines and YouTube for a safe and age-appropriate surfing experience.
mode_hard_desc: With particularly strict blocklists for maximum protection – this may limit some functions. No exceptions (whitelists) are allowed.
mode_blank_desc: No blocking active. Uses clean DNS servers without filter lists – full internet access without restrictions.
